features: Easy to Use: UK 2 pin to 3 pin plug adaptor is easy and convenient to use for shaver, toothbrush. Just simply plug and use! Note: Please be aware that this does NOT convert voltage!
Compact and Portable: No cable needed, this UK visitor travel adapter with lightweight design is ideal for travel. 230W, 1A fuse approved make it safe to use home or abroad.
Certificated Safe: Approved by UKCA,CE&RoHS certificates. UK shaver plug adaptor provides protection against short circuit, heat-resistant, over-current and over-voltage.
High Quality: Applicable to UK standards, EU to UK plug adaptor is made of high quality materials, which has compact design and solid construction.
What You Get: ExtraStar 2 pin to 3 pin EU to UK shavers plug adapter*4 and our friendly customer service. Any questions about the item, please feel free to contact us.
